property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\java17\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;c:\Users\Suparno\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\Suparno\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\Suparno\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.15\bin;C:\java17\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\Suparno\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64;C:\Users\Suparno\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Scripts;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\;C:\Program Files\Inkscape\bin;C:\Program Files\Go\bin;C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin;C:\Users\Suparno\.local\bin;C:\Users\Suparno\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Suparno\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Suparno\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\Suparno\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;C:\Users\Suparno\AppData\Local\Python\bin;C:\Users\Suparno\go\bin;c:\Users\Suparno\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0\bundled\scripts\noConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: Borrower grade A memiliki limit Rp 500 juta
Borrower grade B memiliki limit Rp 200 juta
Borrower grade C memiliki limit Rp 50 juta
Borrower grade D memiliki limit Rp 10 juta
Borrower grade A tenor yang diizinkan adalah 3 6 12 24 bulan
Borrower grade D tenor yang diizinkan adalah 1 dan 3 bulan
Pengajuan ditolak jika amount nol
Pengajuan ditolak jika amount negatif
Pengajuan ditolak jika amount melebihi limit grade
Pengajuan diterima jika amount dalam batas grade
Pengajuan ditolak jika tenor tidak tersedia untuk grade
Pengajuan diterima jika tenor tersedia untuk grade
